title: 前日譚③　～ダンスレッスン！～

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We did iiit! Yes, we're the beeest!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. Are you going to do that every time we finish a song? Let's get on with the next one already.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's. I'm glad both of you are brimming with motivation. We're
almost ready for the commemorative concert, so let's keep up the
pace.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Taishin! We have to do our best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see the BNW trio are in high spirits! But the Robot, Rose, and I will
not lose!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon, are you really okay with being called a robot?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Classification accepted. "Robot" forms an alliterative pair with your
"Rose," and is both brief and identifiable.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, you two, let's go! RRI, hoorah!
